zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Langford於大約1400年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，他的父親John Langford33歲，母親Catherine Rhuddin29歲。他於1425年與Lady Alicia Griffith在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年7月12日享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Langford was born about 1400, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, John Langford, was 33 and his mother, Catherine Rhuddin, was 29. He married Lady Alicia Griffith in 1425, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 July 1466, at the age of 67.

Il a épousé Lady Alicia Griffith en 1425, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1466, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Langford(이)가 대략 1400년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Langford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Rhuddin(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 웨일스에서 Lady Alicia Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 7월 12일 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alicia Griffith в 1425 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 июля 1466 г. в возрасте 67 лет.
